problem.title: Implement Bubble Sort
problem.description:
Problem: Implement Bubble Sort - Implement the algorithm.

Input:
- First line: integer n
- Second line: n space-separated integers

Output:
- Print the sorted array or search result

Example:
Input:
5
64 34 25 12 22

Output:
12 22 25 34 64

solution.explanation: Read n and the array, perform bubble sort with two nested loops, then print the sorted array.
